description_long: This is a wristwatch featuring a round, metallic case with a clean, minimalist dial and a single visible crown on the right side. The dial is white or light gray, lacking any visible numerals or indices, and is covered by a clear glass or acrylic crystal. The strap is a military-style olive green NATO band, made of woven fabric with multiple adjustment holes and a metal buckle. The back of the watch case is solid and metallic, with visible lugs securing the strap. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear. The watch exudes a rugged, understated aesthetic with no visible branding or decorative embellishments.
description: A minimalist wristwatch with a round metallic case, white dial, and olive green NATO fabric strap. The design is utilitarian and unbranded, with a clean, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white dial, round case, and olive green NATO strap with adjustment holes.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the case and the protruding crown on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid metallic case back and the full length of the olive green strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the case thickness and strap attachment without the crown.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist with a plain white or light gray background, lacking numerals, indices, or decorative elements. There are no subdials, textures, or patterns, and the style is clean and utilitarian.
attribute_strap_type: NATO strap made of olive green woven fabric, featuring multiple adjustment holes and a metal buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with a simple arrangement, likely with two or three hands (not clearly visible), and no complications or special features.
